scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @benchlocal/core && npm run build --workspace @benchlocal/sdk && npm run build --workspace @benchlocal/plugin-host && npm run build --workspace app
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @benchlocal/core && npm run typecheck --workspace @benchlocal/sdk && npm run typecheck --workspace @benchlocal/plugin-host && npm run typecheck --workspace app
